mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_circle (user_id, content, like_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE diary_circle SET content = #{content}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT dc.*, u.name, u.avatar FROM diary_circle dc LEFT JOIN user u ON dc.user_id = u.id WHERE dc.id = #{id}
SELECT dc.*, u.name, u.avatar FROM diary_circle dc LEFT JOIN user u ON dc.user_id = u.id ORDER BY dc.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT dc.*, u.name, u.avatar FROM diary_circle dc LEFT JOIN user u ON dc.user_id = u.id WHERE dc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY dc.create_time DESC
